text:
お客さんが言ってたの。
クラバーダってダーカーの
甲殻が超堅い、って！

うまく加工すれば
すり鉢に使えると思うの！

今度も期待して待ってるわ。
よろしくお

So a customer was telling me there are these
Falspawn called Krabahda, and they've got
ultra-thick carapaces!

Sounds like something I could make into the
perfect mortar for grinding things up!
I'll be eagerly waiting, as usual. Good luck!
